claims.summary: The current regulator is explicitly PI-based and balances fill and lambda-relative state rather than the old token gate.
claims.disposition: verify the current regulator module boundary and PI source

claims.summary: Integral accumulation needs anti-windup protection when the actuator cannot correct persistent error.
claims.disposition: verify bounded accumulators, back-calculation, actuator-aware conditional integration, and hard clamps

claims.summary: Viscosity lag and PI hunting require a sustained temporal comparison rather than a one-snapshot causal story.
claims.disposition: route a bounded idle and high-semantic-load regulator replay using existing evidence-only diagnostics

claims.summary: Changing Kp, Ki, damping, gate behavior, porosity, or lambda targets alters live Minime control.
claims.disposition: preserve an exact Tier 5 operator-approval wait
